title: TC4 Arcane Workbench / Infusion craftCycle / Aura Node HUD deep parity
strict_parity_rule: No new items, recipes, mechanics, GUI layouts, progression or fake effects were added. Changes only tighten TC4 1.7.10 parity or mark Forge 1.19.2 adapter boundaries.
changes: Added TC4ArcaneWorkbenchParity hitbox helpers for output slot, wand slot and primal aspect icon hover positions so screen/menu coordinates do not drift.
Arcane Workbench now plays the original TC4 craftstart sound through the server-side output-take path instead of silently consuming the matrix.
Arcane Workbench aspect hover uses the existing original aspect icons/costs and wand cap modifier; no recipe browser or modern button was added.
Added TC4InfusionCraftCycleParity as a single ledger for TileInfusionMatrix craftCycle delays, sound keys and debug-display policy.
Infusion Matrix normal start/complete/waiting debug chat is gated off by default while preserving the internal state/NBT/audit data.
Infusion Matrix essentia drain now records the real jar source and sends the source-to-matrix FX path from that jar instead of spawning a generic matrix-only portal puff.
Removed the non-TC4 happy-villager progress particle marker from InfusionProcessHelper.
Aura Node HUD now uses shared pixel constants for hud.png/node_bubble.png/nodes.png frame sizes and no longer paints debug-like type/total/E text over the revealer HUD.
Fixed AuraNodeRenderer's stale undefined FRAMES token by using TC4AuraNodeHudParity.NODE_SHEET_FRAMES while preserving earlier audit-compatible comments.
Added and wired tc4_stage703_722_arcane_infusion_node_deep_audit.py into GitHub Actions.
adapter_notes: Infusion Matrix still remains a Forge 1.19.2 adapter around TC4 craftCycle; full instability/failure/FX parity is not complete.
Aura Node HUD still needs deeper pixel matching against original Gui/HUD draw order and alpha, but this stage removes debug text and centralizes atlas constants.
Arcane Workbench still needs more exact vanilla/arcane container item edge-cases and all original ConfigRecipes coverage.
